notes: Without issue label context, baseline correctly identifies new methods as a feature rather than a bug fix
Issue linking is the single biggest differentiator: with_skill links to GitHub issues in 2/3 evals; baseline never does
Eval 2 (complex-multifile) shows the largest gap (100% vs 25%) — skill's smart question-asking and scoped message are the key wins
no_fabricated_issue_link passes 100% for both configs — neither hallucinates issue refs, so this assertion is non-discriminating
Baseline is 15.7s faster and uses ~2839 fewer tokens — the gh CLI context gathering has a real overhead cost
type selection differs on eval 3: baseline chose 'feat' for new methods; skill chose 'fix' by reading issue labels — a meaningful quality difference
